name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America North Miami Beach, Florida — Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans ($100–$1,000), and title loans ($2,000–$...
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical store locations across multiple states, including this Jacksonville, FL branch, and provides online lending options. Founded to serve consumers with immediate financial needs between paychecks, Advance America has built a large customer base relying on speed and accessibility.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (2–4 week terms, $100–$500), Installment Loans (longer repayment terms, $100–$1,000), and Title Loans (vehicle-backed loans up to $25,000). Loans can be obtained online or in-store, with same-day funding available. The Jacksonville location also offers Western Union services. All applications require government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

Advance America distinguishes itself through extensive physical retail presence, bilingual staff support (Spanish-language services noted), extended store hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–4 p.m. Saturday), and high customer ratings (4.9 out of 5 stars across 125,489 reviews as of the website snapshot). The company emphasizes trained staff to explain loan options and match customers with appropriate products.

However, as a traditional payday and title lender, Advance America's products typically carry high APRs—substantially above the 36% threshold that defines predatory lending. While convenient for genuine emergencies, these loans are expensive debt solutions best used sparingly. The lack of specific APR disclosure on the website is notable and should be clarified before applying.
address: 755 NE 167th St, North Miami Beach, FL 33162

company_info.headquarters: 755 NE 167th St, North Miami Beach, FL 33162

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for payday and installment loans
Physical store locations for in-person service and face-to-face counseling
Bilingual (Spanish/English) staff and services at select locations
Extended hours including Saturday service (9 a.m.–4 p.m.)
Installment loans offer larger amounts ($100–$1,000) and longer repayment terms than payday loans
Title loans up to $25,000 for vehicle owners with paid-off cars
High customer satisfaction ratings (4.9/5 stars from 125,489 reviews)
cons: High APR typical of payday/title loans—substantially above 36% (rates not disclosed on website)
Payday loans are short-term (2–4 weeks), creating rollover debt risk if not repaid in full
Title loans risk vehicle repossession if borrower defaults
Limited to small loan amounts for unsecured products ($100–$500 payday, up to $1,000 installment)
No mention of credit-building benefits or financial counseling services
best_for: Consumers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (medical, car repair, utility bills) who can repay within weeks
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency amounts ($2,000–$25,000) who are comfortable using their car as collateral
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and prefer not to apply entirely online
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking bilingual lending support
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers with genuine emergency cash needs who can repay within weeks and have access to a physical location or prefer online applications. The critical caveat is that these loans are expensive (high APR), suitable only for short-term emergencies, not as regular credit solutions; borrowers should explore payday alternative lenders or credit unions before committing.
services: Extended store hours including Saturday service

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
